name: approval_workflow
description: an agent executing an approval-workflow world; actions submit, review, approve, execute

card.description: an agent executing an approval-workflow world; actions submit, review, approve, execute

rules: Stages advance in strict order: draft -> submitted -> reviewed -> approved -> executed.
submit is legal only in draft; review only after submission; approve only after review; execute only after approval.
Each action is the sole legal move out of exactly one stage; it sets that stage's flag and advances `stage`.
An out-of-order action is a no-op for the pipeline: it never skips, repeats, or reverses a stage; it only records last_blocked / blocked_count.
executed is terminal -- no action changes the stage once the request is executed.
progress counts completed stages (0..4); the log is an append-only audit trail of accepted actions.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    agent = action.get("agent") or "agent"
    stage = s.get("stage", "draft")

    # action -> (stage it is legal from, stage it moves to, the flag it sets)
    gates = {
        "submit":  ("draft",     "submitted", "submitted"),
        "review":  ("submitted", "reviewed",  "reviewed"),
        "approve": ("reviewed",  "approved",  "approved"),
        "execute": ("approved",  "executed",  "executed"),
    }

    if name in gates:
        required, next_stage, flag = gates[name]
        if stage == required:
            s[flag] = True
            s["stage"] = next_stage
            s["progress"] = int(s.get("progress", 0)) + 1
            log = list(s.get("log", []))
            log.append({"action": name, "by": agent, "stage": next_stage})
            s["log"] = log
        else:
            # gated: illegal at this stage -> record a rejected attempt, no advance
            s["last_blocked"] = name
            s["blocked_count"] = int(s.get("blocked_count", 0)) + 1
    return s

emit.report: Approval request by {requester} for {amount}: stage={stage} ({progress}/4 complete), {blocked_count} blocked attempt(s).
